{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

Same-host trusted-proxy deployments could accept local forged identity headers. In affected versions, a local same-host caller that can reach the proxy-facing Gateway port could supply identity headers normally reserved for the trusted proxy.

This advisory is scoped to the named feature and configuration. It does not change OpenClaw's trusted-operator model: authenticated Gateway operators, installed plugins, and intentional local execution surfaces remain trusted unless a separate policy, approval, allowlist, sandbox, or auth boundary is crossed.

### Impact

When the affected feature is enabled and reachable, this could receive operator identity associated with the forged headers. Practical impact depends on the operator's configuration and whether lower-trust input can reach that path.

### Patched Versions

The first stable patched version is `2026.5.18`.

### Mitigations

bind trusted-proxy ingress behind the actual proxy and firewall direct same-host access. As general hardening, keep channel and tool allowlists narrow, avoid sharing one Gateway between mutually untrusted users, and disable the affected feature when it is not needed.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rggc-m335-3wvj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T16:03:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rggc-m335-3wvj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rggc-m335-3wvj"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T16:03:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-rggc-m335-3wvj", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rggc-m335-3wvj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-rggc-m335-3wvj", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Same-host trusted-proxy deployments could accept local forged identity headers", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T16:03:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rggc-m335-3wvj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.5.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Same-host trusted-proxy deployments could accept local forged identity headers
